data.content: Plan complete for additive setup CLI. Four-layer approach: (1) new bash TOML reader (~150 lines) parsing existing settings.toml into KV store — handles both shell-writer and smol-toml formats, all agent metadata fields, quoted keys, pools, multi-line strings; (2) writer fixes quoting agent IDs and emitting all metadata + preserving backend.type/defaults.profileId/terminalLightTheme from loaded values; (3) additive wizard behavior in both setup.sh and agent-wizard.sh — load existing config, seed REGISTERED_AGENTS from file, remove both REGISTERED_AGENTS=() resets, remove both single-agent overwrite branches, show existing agents/mappings/pools with keep-by-default prompts, allow adding new variants for already-registered commands, make dispatch and defaults wizards additive; (4) comprehensive tests including TOML reader unit tests, cross-format round-trip tests, and PTY integration tests seeding advanced settings with 3 agents (full metadata), weighted pools, custom scope prompt, non-default scalars, and terminalLightTheme=true — then verifying one incremental change preserves everything. ~1020 lines across 8 files. All 12 prior rejection points explicitly addressed.
